EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The user {subject.name} from host {src.host} failed to transfer the file "{object.name}" to a device due to the policies: {datafield6}
The user {subject.name} from host {src.host} transferred the file "{object.name}" to a device
The user {subject.name} from host {src.host} transferred the file "{object.name}" to a device in violation of the policies: {datafield6}
The user {subject.name} from host {src.host} failed to transfer the file "{object.name}" to a device
